title: Launching Puffer 1: Flattened Observations and Accelerated Vectorization
summary: Presented Puffer 1, a library that uses NumPy structured data types to flatten complex observation spaces, enabling drop-in compatibility with existing RL code and significant speedups. Demonstrated working demos on MiniHack, NetHack, MiniGrid, Procgen, and Neural MMO, achieving up to 2x performance improvements.
